commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR threads embedded runtime `toolsAllow` into local-model lean filtering and schema projection, with focused regression coverage for message and wildcard allowlists.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +65. Total +91 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main's lean filter denies `message`, existing tests define `forceMessageTool` and `message_tool_only` as message-preserving paths, and the PR only preserves explicit `runtimeToolAllowlist`. I did not run a live provider/model turn in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can thread the existing runtime-required message set into lean preservation and add tests; no product decision is needed.

target.title: fix(agents): preserve runtime tools in lean mode
target.body:
## Summary

- Preserve explicitly runtime-allowed tools when `localModelLean` applies its lightweight deny list.
- Thread the effective embedded `toolsAllow` list into tool construction and schema projection so runtime-required tools stay visible consistently.
- Add coverage for preserving `message` through lean mode and for wildcard allowlists not disabling lean mode wholesale.

## Verification

Latest pushed head: `33d998d63c1` on base `e1a98171417`.

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts --reporter=dot` passed: 66 tests across 2 routed Vitest shards, 14.40s.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed with exit 0: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_d027f7a77235`, slug `amber-krill`, run `run_4aac22714949`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, lease stopped.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` passed clean: no accepted/actionable findings, overall 0.86.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `localModelLean` no longer strips a tool that the runtime explicitly allowed for the current run, such as `message` for reply-required runs.

Real environment tested: focused local Vitest wrapper in a Codex worktree plus AWS Crabbox Linux `c7a.8xlarge` remote changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed on pushed SHA `33d998d63c1`; Crabbox run `run_4aac22714949` completed `pnpm check:changed` with exit 0; autoreview had no accepted/actionable findings after the final rebase.

Observed result after fix: lean local model mode still trims broad heavyweight defaults, but preserves explicitly requested runtime tools through construction and prompt/schema projection.

What was not tested: live provider/model execution was not run for this narrow tool filtering change.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
